Wellness Activities

Choose an activity to nurture your mind and body.

4 min

Box Breathing

Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, hold 4s. Repeat to calm your nervous system.

5 min

4-7-8 Relaxation

A powerful technique to reduce anxiety and help you fall asleep faster.

10 min

Body Scan

Slowly scan through your body, releasing tension from head to toe.

8 min

Loving Kindness

Send warmth and compassion to yourself and others through guided meditation.

5 min

Gratitude Journal

Write down 3 things you're grateful for today. Shift your perspective.

7 min

Emotion Reflection

Explore what you're feeling and why. Gain clarity through writing.
